macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Stock Markets Plunge Amid Iran Escalation and Oil Surge
items.summary: Global stock markets experienced significant declines on March 8, 2026, with US indices falling sharply as oil prices surged above $100 per barrel amid escalating Iran tensions. Asian markets entered correction territory with losses exceeding 4-7% across major benchmarks.

items.title: Oil Crisis Drives Stagflation Concerns as WTI Breaks $90
items.summary: Oil prices experienced historic surges, breaking through $90 per barrel as Middle East tensions escalated. Market analysts warn of potential stagflation risks similar to 1970s conditions, with US crude reserves at multi-year lows.

items.title: S&P 500 and Dow Jones Break Key Technical Levels
items.summary: The S&P 500 declined 3.7% for the month and broke through its 18-week moving average, while the Dow Jones fell to lower Bollinger bands in oversold conditions. Technical support levels are being tested as markets search for stabilization.

items.title: Taiwan and Asian Markets Enter Technical Correction
items.summary: Taiwan futures plunged 7% with TSMC-led declines, while Hong Kong's Hang Seng and Seoul markets dropped 3-8%, officially entering correction territory as regional stocks fell 4-6% across major benchmarks.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Shows Recovery Signs with 5 Tokens Posting Double-Digit Gains
items.summary: The crypto market is recovering on March 9, 2026, with Mobox (MBOX) up 39.16%, DeepBook Protocol up 13.93%, and Sahara AI up 10.96% in the last 24 hours, alongside other risers amid recent pressure.

items.title: Bitcoin Slips Below $67,000 as Ethereum Dips Under $2,000
items.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum prices declined on March 9, 2026, with BTC falling below $67,000 and ETH under $2,000 due to cautious investor sentiment and macroeconomic factors.

items.title: Kalshi Launches Ecosystem Hub Partnering with Solana and Base
items.summary: US-regulated prediction market Kalshi debuted KalshiEco Hub on March 9, 2026, in partnership with Solana and Base, offering grants and support for builders while enabling SOL and USDC deposits.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Luma AI Releases Uni-1 Image Model Outperforming Nano-Banana 2
items.summary: Luma Labs launched Uni-1, a new image generation model that sets a new standard for photorealistic generation and outperforms the popular Nano-Banana 2 according to Hacker News discussions.

items.title: MIT Develops Technique to Improve AI Explainability in Computer Vision
items.summary: MIT researchers created a method using sparse autoencoders and multimodal LLMs to transform any computer vision model into one providing human-understandable concept-based explanations, enhancing accuracy and clarity in high-stakes applications like medical diagnostics.

items.title: GitHub Introduces Engram: Brain-Inspired Context Database for AI Agents
items.summary: A new Show HN project on GitHub, Engram, offers a brain-inspired memory layer designed to enhance context management for AI agents.

items.title: Drone Strikes Raise Doubts Over Gulf States as AI Superpowers
items.summary: Recent drone strikes on data centers highlight geopolitical risks, questioning the Gulf's ambitions to become an AI superpower amid vulnerabilities in AI infrastructure.
items.source: The Guardian via Midnight Signal AI

items.title: Canada Pushes AI Research with Brain-Machine Learning Integration and Robotics Advances
items.summary: A new report highlights Canada's AI efforts, including CIFAR's program merging machine learning and neuroscience, and MA Robot AI's hybrid framework for real-world autonomous delivery robots tested in hospitals.

items.title: George Brown College Showcases AI Innovation Challenge Progress
items.summary: George Brown advances institutional AI adoption, with ChatGPT Edu usage surging to over 32,000 monthly queries and new custom GPTs, highlighted at the 2026 Innovation Challenge alongside Microsoft insights on AI in education.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Valve Recommits to 2026 Launch for Steam Machine
items.summary: Valve has reaffirmed that the Steam Machine will launch in 2026 despite earlier concerns about delays due to the RAM crisis. However, the original Q1 launch window appears unlikely to be met.

items.title: Hunter: The Reckoning Sequel Accidentally Revealed via Steam Update
items.summary: An unannounced Hunter: The Reckoning sequel was briefly exposed when a Steam update for RoboCop: Rogue City mistakenly replaced the game with the incomplete sequel.

items.title: Iowa House Bill Proposes $20 Million in Gaming Industry Incentives
items.summary: An Iowa House bill would establish state grant and loan programs plus up to $20 million in tax credits to attract video game developers to the state, with fellowships worth up to $200,000 for industry veterans.

items.title: Virtuos Expands Board of Directors
items.summary: Video game development company Virtuos announced the appointment of three independent members to its Board of Directors to support its next phase of collaborative game development.

items.title: South Korean Game Makers Embrace Idle Games as Low-Cost Strategy
items.summary: South Korea's video game industry is increasingly turning to idle games—a genre requiring minimal player interaction—as a cost-effective approach in a challenging market.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: India Launches First Integrated Ocean Thermal Energy Conversion Plant in Lakshadweep
items.summary: Union Minister Jitendra Singh reviewed progress on India's pioneering OTEC plant in Kavaratti, Lakshadweep, marking a key advancement in renewable ocean energy technology. The project highlights rapid development capabilities in sustainable energy infrastructure.

items.title: India Notifies Standards for Green Ammonia and Green Methanol under National Green Hydrogen Mission
items.summary: The Government of India has officially notified standards for green ammonia and green methanol, advancing the National Green Hydrogen Mission to promote clean fuel production and usage.

items.title: BEL and SASMOS Sign MoU to Boost Indigenous Defence Manufacturing
items.summary: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) and SASMOS signed a Memorandum of Understanding to enhance indigenous defence electronics manufacturing and exports, featuring rapid development of defence-grade systems.

items.title: Hong Kong Completes First Green Methanol Bunkering Operation
items.summary: Hong Kong achieved a milestone by completing its first green methanol bunkering, supporting the green transformation of its international shipping hub through sustainable marine fuels.

items.title: Marvell Technology Reports Strong Q4 Data-Center Revenue and 1.6T Solutions Bookings
items.summary: Marvell's Q4 data-center revenue reached $1.5B with 40% growth, featuring first-to-market 1.6T high-speed interconnects and strong bookings from Tier 1 customers for rapid ramp-up in 2027.

items.title: NABARD Launches National Climate Stack Innovation Challenge
items.summary: The National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) initiated the 'National Climate Stack Innovation Challenge' to enhance rural climate intelligence through technological innovations.
